description: Rebuild the review workspace layout (WorkspaceLayout.tsx) with a new 3-tab information architecture: Overview (default), Findings, and Technical Activity. Create the new ReviewOverview component as the default tab showing a clean report summary, top findings, recommended next steps, and primary actions. Hide all agent/control-room UI behind Technical Activity tab. Create the ReviewProgressState component for the running/analyzing state that is calm and simple.
steps: Create src/components/workspace/ReviewSummaryCard.tsx - a summary card that shows: review status, repo name, overall risk/readiness verdict, total findings count, severity breakdown (critical/high/medium/low counts), and recommended next action. Use existing deriveVerdict logic from ResultsDashboard.tsx and the ConsensusOutput type from domain.ts. Follow the styling pattern from the landing page sample report summary bar.

Create src/components/workspace/TopFindingsList.tsx - show the top 3 findings by severity. Each finding shows severity badge, title, file/location if available from artifact content, short description. Pull data from session.artifacts sorted by severity (risks first, then decisions). Link to Findings tab for full list.

Create src/components/workspace/RecommendedNextSteps.tsx - a component showing primary actions: Copy fix plan (using the existing handleCopyFixPlan logic), Export report, Re-run review (trigger another pass), and Analyze another repo (link to landing page). Adapt the action buttons from the existing ResultsDashboard actions section.

Create src/components/workspace/ReviewOverview.tsx - the main Overview tab component that composes ReviewSummaryCard, TopFindingsList, RecommendedNextSteps. For the pre-consensus state (analysis still running or not started), show ReviewProgressState instead. This replaces ResultsDashboard as the default tab.

Create src/components/workspace/ReviewProgressState.tsx - shown during active analysis. Display: 'Analyzing repository...' heading, current step description (mapped from currentStage: proposal='Reading repository structure', critique='Inspecting important files', revision='Checking for risks and bugs', consensus='Preparing report'), a simple progress indicator (animated bar or dots, not the 4-stage pipeline widget), and a message 'You will see findings here as soon as they are ready.' Optional: 'Show technical activity' link that switches to Technical Activity tab.

Create src/components/workspace/TechnicalActivityPanel.tsx - a wrapper component that contains the existing DebateChat, AgentArena/AgentStrip, ToolCallTrace, StageProgressBar, RoundEtaIndicator, TokenBudgetBar, and round indicators. This is the 'power user' tab. Import and compose existing components - do not delete them.

Rewrite src/components/workspace/WorkspaceLayout.tsx to implement the new 3-tab structure: tabs are [{id:'overview', label:'Overview'}, {id:'findings', label:'Findings', badge: artifactCount}, {id:'technical', label:'Technical activity'}]. Default activeTab is 'overview'. Remove the left-side AgentArena panel from the main layout. Remove footer round dots from default view. Remove StageProgressBar from the header area (moved into TechnicalActivityPanel). Simplify header: keep back button and title. Hide ExportMenu unless consensus exists. Hide 'End' button in a menu or only show in Technical Activity. Keep the auto-start logic (useEffect with ?start=1). Keep all existing API call handlers.
Update src/components/workspace/MobileTabBar.tsx to reflect the 3 new tabs (Overview, Findings, Technical activity) with appropriate icons.
acceptance_criteria: Default view when opening a session is the Overview tab
Overview shows ReviewSummaryCard when consensus data exists
Overview shows ReviewProgressState when analysis is active
Technical activity tab contains all the agent/debug/control-room components
No agent panels, token bars, stage progress pipelines, or round dots visible in Overview or Findings tabs
All existing workspace components are preserved (just re-homed into Technical Activity)
Auto-start with ?start=1 query param still works
Build passes with no new errors
verification: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/movistan && npx prisma generate && npx next build` - must pass
Run `cd /projects/sandbox/movistan && npx vitest run` - no NEW test failures introduced
findings: Build passes cleanly. 22 pre-existing test failures (all backend: database-stores, round-orchestrator, summary-services, and 1 ui-logic deriveVerdict assertion) - none introduced by this change. The useEventStream hook returns Partial<Record<AgentType, PersistedEvent>> not a Map - corrected in TechnicalActivityPanel interface. StageTransitionToast is kept at the layout level since it monitors all transitions regardless of active tab.
